rulings.Case Title: GRADY FRAZIER VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel- Civil
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 20, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Brayton Purcell¿s motion to be relieved as counsel for plaintiff is granted. No opposition filed. Hearing required unless counsel informs plaintiff of this tentative ruling and plaintiff states that he does not wish to contest. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: GEORGE VALLADON VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS
rulings.Calendar Matter: Joinder To Defendant Dynalectric Companys Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss For Delay In Prosecution
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 20, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 2. Defendant Swinerton Builders¿ joinder to Dynalectric Co.¿s motion to dismiss for delay in prosecution is off calendar at the moving party¿s request. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: GEORGE VALLADON VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Dismiss For Delay In Prosecution
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 20, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 2. Defendant Dynalectric Company¿s motion to dismiss for delay in prosecution is off calendar. Defendant was dismissed on September 24. = (220/HEK)
